title: carex obtusa
intro: Carex obtusa, also known as the hair grass or tough sedge, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex obtusa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Carex obtusa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to alleviate symptoms of colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues.
